import React from 'react' import c from './mainReport.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' import { API } from '../../api' const FinancesReport = () => { const [ expense, setExpense ] = React.useState(0) React.useEffect(() => { API.getDailyExpenses() .then(res => setExpense(res.data)) API.getMonthlyData() .then(res => setExpense(prev => ({spent_today: res.data.daily_expense, ...prev}))) }, []) return (

Итого закупа за сегодня

{expense.added_today} наименований

Расходы за сегодня

{expense?.spent_today} сом

Расходов за месяц

{expense?.expense_this_month} сом

) } export default FinancesReport
